Earnings & Results Disclaimer

Last updated: May 16, 2026

"Results are not typical. Individual results may vary based on individual effort, business condition, and implementation of the methodologies discussed."

No Guarantees

M.L. Suriya and his associated programs (Peaceful Profit Monk / Life Success Science) do not guarantee that you will achieve any specific financial or personal results by using our methodologies. Any examples of business growth or personal transformation shared on this website or in our sessions are illustrative and do not represent a promise of future performance.

Personal Responsibility

The success of any business or personal development practice depends on a variety of factors, including your background, dedication, and the specific market conditions of your industry. You acknowledge that any investment in business growth carries inherent risk, and you assume full responsibility for any decisions made based on the information provided in our sessions.

Not Professional Advice

The information provided during our masterclasses and on this website is for educational and guidance purposes only. It does not constitute legal, financial, or psychological professional advice. Please consult with the appropriate professionals before making significant business or personal health decisions.

Contact Us

If you have questions about this disclaimer, please contact us at info@herequality.com.
